_comment #1: You can 'comment out' options by adding an underscore at the beginning, so you don't have to remove them completely. Entries that are 'commented' are ignored by the 'get_dicts.py' program.
_comment #2: For URL entries, add them as a list of links, with '{query}' where the search query should go in the URL (search something on the dictionary/translator to see where the search words go).
_comment #3: For 'chrome' command-line arguments, add them as a string entry. This is the entire list of options: https://peter.sh/experiments/chromium-command-line-switches/.
